name: OrangeHRM
description: Looking for a flexible HR solution? We offer a modular solution that grows with you. Join our global community of 5 million+ users! Learn more about OrangeHRM

reviews.review_title: Simple and Quick
reviews.review_description: We are able to track the time spent on each project
reviews.review_pros: I love the way that it doesn't have any junk details. It's so easy to login and add projects and the time that you've clocked. We use it for all our new projects and it becomes easy for us to manage our time
reviews.review_cons: The time that it takes to log on could be better, but again that's something we need to fix internally.

reviews.review_title: Good and affordable HRM platform
reviews.review_description: Orange HRM helps us to manage human resources
reviews.review_pros: I like that they offer free Open Source plan. Performance management is great feature, especially when it is available in free plan.
reviews.review_cons: The software is hard to set up and operate. The software is a bit buggy and sometimes operates very slowly.

reviews.review_title: Easy to use but not a lot of features available
reviews.review_description: A good platform that does it's job but it could use some improvement, especially on the UI part.
reviews.review_pros: It has the basic features and it's simple and easy to use.
reviews.review_cons: I didn't like the old user interface and I didn't like the fact that it didn't have a lot of options or features to use in your account. I would've liked to be more customizable.

reviews.review_title: Very useful
reviews.review_pros: Orange HRM makes leave applications so simple that one can have a full interaction to the HR department without being there
reviews.review_cons: The system is not stable, sometimes its up, some times its down, for no apparent reason. I hope to see a stable release

reviews.review_title: This system is simple to use. The customer support is readily available and willing to help anytime.
reviews.author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Great system with a nice user interface, easy to learn and use. Value for money is assured while using OrangeHRM.
reviews.review_pros: OrangeHRM is really user friendly and provides an excellent platform for basic keeping of records, very ideal for any start up.
reviews.review_cons: One misses some of the crucial features like payroll and budgeting modules while using the open source version. These are some very key areas in any Human Resource Department.

reviews.review_title: A Fairly good software.
reviews.review_description: Easy Employee management and a fairly simple user interface for the software users.
reviews.review_pros: It enables automated leave entitlement and management and this makes the job of both the Human resource manager and the employees very easy.
reviews.review_cons: The software is fairly difficult to setup correctly and their customer support take a long time to reply.

reviews.review_title: Great addition
reviews.review_pros: Leave entitlements are easily displayed, and one can plan for them. Sick leaves are able to be communicated in the comments
reviews.review_cons: It is a seperate application that cannot be integrated with by other orange software for example orangescrum

reviews.review_title: Excellent management information
reviews.author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Excellent management information, it's easy to use. software functionality is great as wells as its cost, it bring you good tools to improve the development and selection of personnel in your company
reviews.review_cons: we'd improve customers support since its level is very low. we hope you can solve this problem and that the platform continues to update in time

reviews.review_title: Excellent program adapted to facilitate the work of Human Resources
reviews.author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: help in the recruitment and control of personnel
reviews.review_pros: Benefits in the ease and time saving in everything related to the recruitment of personnel organization within small and medium industries
reviews.review_cons: Some of the applications become slow and without benefits of changes at the moment they still have many things to improve

reviews.review_title: Simple and basic Human Resource Management System
reviews.author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: community edition is free and open source and can be used by any small business to manage human resources can be easily customized and additional functionality can be added. Modules development is very easy.
reviews.review_cons: Community edition is very basic and does not include the most wanted features cost of paid version is very high and they never disclose the pricing

reviews.review_title: Employee Management made simpler with OrangeHRM
reviews.review_description: Great so far, no issues to report at this time.
reviews.review_pros: Ease of use and customer service. Employee matters are accessible and can be transferred from within the OrangeHRM system.
reviews.review_cons: Have not discovered that yet. So far, the system has what is needed to adequately track our staff information.

reviews.review_title: Perfect for HR
reviews.review_pros: This allows me to access all necessary information about me and my position. Also allows me to basic information regarding my co-workers.
reviews.review_cons: I use this software as a restricted user so some things I am unable to edit. I use it more or less as read-only. Not a fault of the software, I say that to say because of how it is allowed to me by my employer, I do not have any complaints about the software itself.

reviews.review_title: Great platform for project and employee management.
reviews.review_description: Helpful to track our performance and tasks. Also, it is very easy to use and manage.
reviews.review_pros: Very easy to use and navigate. In Orange HRM , we can always evaluate our performance and working hours. It also notifies friends birthdays. It is effectively structured and categorized. Which makes the navigation and usage more easily. It also provides a mobile interface, which is great in use
reviews.review_cons: Sometimes when we manually enter the details and check in/ check out, the details are not saving for the first time and have to r enter the data again.

reviews.review_title: OrangeHRM Small/Medium sized entity
reviews.review_pros: Ease of use, great team that are extremely helpful and responsive when we have issues, Tailored aspects that are unique to our organization.
reviews.review_cons: They're are costs associated with every aspect of the software, this is something that allows you to tailor your own needs. however, it also means that we have to find more money to use these additional features.

reviews.review_title: A Cloud Based HRM Application We Could Not Do Without
reviews.review_description: We researched several HRM applications at the time we decided to transition away from our prior system. We weighed all options and made the decision to go with OrangeHRM. Pros: o Excellent customer support o Very easy and functional report generator application for ad-hoc reporting o Easy to use timesheet tracking built as module within the system o Leave tracking seemed to happen effortlessly o Extremely user friendly, pleasant interface both for staff and the company o Easy custom fields in addition to more complex customization options o Recruitment module o Performance Module for annual and 6 month new hire reviews o Very knowledgeable and helpful sales contact o Easy and intuitive navigation within the system o Fantastic training o Will soon have mobile application of their cloud-based software o Company is very open to client feedback o The portal is customized with your logo and colors so it has your branding Cons o It's hard to think of a con realistically, as if there is anything that we need to be done with the system, we know it can be addressed. The defaults may not be what we'd always like, but it's fine as we can modify it to meet out needs. So what may start out as a 'con' in this area turns into a 'pro' as in the end you have the system you'd like to have. o There is no integration with outside applications (i.e., payroll). This is not a con for us as we have no need for this - but for some companies seeking this, it is not part of this application's functionality. OrangeHRM doesn't try to be all things to all people like some HRM systems - which then end up being costly and much more complicated - but they have developed a solid HRM system with a very easy user interface for those companies looking for this. I would highly recommend at least exploring this solution when researching HRM options. This has been a fantastic decision for our company.

reviews.review_title: Excellent facilitates the tasks related to the control, management and administration of personnel
reviews.author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Orange HRM, works and operates from a Web browser (Firefox, Opera, Internet Explorer, among others), which is why the physical characteristics of the equipment are not very demanding. It is enough to have with a computer that has an Internet connection. Orange HRM, works and operates from a Web browser (Firefox, Opera, Internet Explorer, among others), which is why the physical characteristics of the equipment are not very demanding. It is enough to have with a computer that has an Internet connection. As a worker in the recruitment and selection area, she has allowed me to keep a list of job offers and to select personnel. Keep all information related to employees. Automate the processes related to the tracking time. Among others.
reviews.review_pros: It facilitates the tasks collected in the life cycle of the employee. It helps to organize and manage the information of our personnel, simplifying many of the current processes. It unifies and protects the information related to employees. Reduce internal bureaucracy and improve the efficiency of the HR department.
reviews.review_cons: A counter would be that: We must have a dedicated server, that is, a place to host the Orange HRM system

reviews.review_title: Not bad HR tool
reviews.review_pros: I like having all of the information about my employees in one convenient place. I also like the many feature that OrangeCRM has, especially on-boarding process feature - it safes a lot of time.
reviews.review_cons: It is quite expensive for small companies. Also when we first found the software it was pretty hard to figure out what are the pricing options, needed to contact with them to find out.

reviews.review_title: Very good software for small and medium-size businesses
reviews.review_description: It is very cost effective and hassle-free software. Easy to manage for both admin and user. In one word great app.
reviews.review_pros: The attendance management is most attractive part of this software. Just log in to the software and it will record your attendance automatically. Integrate your CRM here too.
reviews.review_cons: Well, I'm still working on that. I'll update here once I come across with anything. As of now didn't find out any.

reviews.review_title: Good human resource management software for any size company
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: I use OrangeHRM to mark my attendance, apply leaves and other HR related activities.
reviews.review_pros: OrangeHRM is provide all the necessary tools to manage human resources of a company that has any number of employees such as employee profiles, attendance with punch in and punch out, leave management etc. in a one place.
reviews.review_cons: User interface of OrangeHRM is outdated when compared to modern day applications. A rework on user interface could attract more customers.

reviews.review_title: Nothing different from other HR softwares
reviews.review_pros: Look, this software is easy to use, pretty clean and well laid out, but it's not anything really all that special versus other HR companies. There's no special tools that you can use, it's just a plain HR system
reviews.review_cons: Like I stated above, there's nothing inherently wrong with it besides the fact that it's not all that innovative, and thus I haven't continued using it.

reviews.review_title: I like why it's free software
reviews.author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: easy implementation and free use for small businesses.
reviews.review_pros: allowed me to solve my client's software for the management of your company in the area of human resources.
reviews.review_cons: modulo modifications according to the needs of my client in your company, very good because small companies do not have much money for large deployments.

reviews.review_title: Human Capital Management on your fingertips!
reviews.review_pros: OrangeHRM makes it possible for the management of human capital within an organisation. I like that the software comes with functionalities such as attendance management, performance tracking and many more.
reviews.review_cons: I would have loved the software to have a built in payroll module.

reviews.review_title: Very unprofessional
reviews.review_pros: ess is okay easy use for employees only can apply entitled leaves
reviews.review_cons: leave entitlements are wrong, adding employees is hard, does not automatically update itself only few admins can use

reviews.review_title: Orange HRM
reviews.review_description: Overall I really Enjoy the easy use of ORANGE HRM and its the perfect HR resource!
reviews.review_pros: I love this software. It allows me to easily give PTO and keeps everything together. It lets my employees request time off, see who is off, and allows you to view pictures to verify who they are.
reviews.review_cons: Sometimes it does crash and is frequently going through updates which has put us behind a little at times.

reviews.review_title: great. easy to use
reviews.review_description: did not have option to add your company logo. did not have option to sort fields when create report did not have printer button at ever screen required printing, such as reporting did not have alert pop up screen or sending report for documentation expiration such as licences hope to see these tools in next version
